headline: MEDIA ALERT: Equinix Sets Conference Call for Second-Quarter Results
summary: Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company®, today announced that it will hold its quarterly conference call on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, at 5:30 p.m. ET (2:30 p.m. PT). The company will discuss second-quarter results for the period ended June 30, 2026.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Equinix, Raises Price Target to $1130
summary: Barclays  analyst Brendan Lynch   maintains Equinix (NASDAQ:EQIX) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $1109 to $1130.
